SELECT DISTINCT sign(value) FROM numbers WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE sign_test AS SELECT sign(value) AS sign_value FROM numbers;
SELECT sign_value FROM sign_test WHERE sign_value = 1;
SELECT sign(value) FROM numbers WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value < 0);
SELECT sign(n.value) FROM numbers n JOIN numbers m ON n.value = -m.value WHERE m.value < 0;
CREATE TABLE complex_test AS SELECT sign(value * 2) AS sign_value FROM numbers;
WITH temp AS (SELECT value, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM numbers) SELECT sign_value FROM temp WHERE sign_value = -1;
SELECT IF(sign(value) = 1, 'Positive', IF(sign(value) = -1, 'Negative', 'Zero')) AS sign_description FROM numbers;
